task_objective: Address code review feedback for durable per-game history
design_decisions: Decoupled backup completion from status refresh: history is recorded immediately after backup, and refresh failures are logged but don't fail the backup result.
Introduced `last_operation` field in history state, calculated by the backend based on the newest timestamp across all history slots.
Hardened `_load_state` with schema and enum validation for history entries to prevent frontend crashes on malformed data.
Simplified frontend `selectedHistory` logic by using the backend-provided `last_operation` field.
Added regression tests for backup-success/refresh-failure scenarios and parameterized auto-exit skip reasons.
results: All 148 tests passing. Backend and frontend hardened against malformed state. UI now consistently shows the latest operation regardless of failure priority.
